samples.text: All roses are flowers. All flowers are plants. Are roses plants?
Every member of roses is among flowers. Every member of flowers is among plants. Does it follow that roses are plants?
All garden roses are blossoms. All blossoms are plants. Are garden roses plants?
plants include all flowers. flowers include all roses. Therefore, are roses plants?
All roses are flowers. All flowers are plants. The weather today is cloudy. Are roses plants?
